philosophy: Present business facts with restraint, hierarchy and a stable visual cadence that supports trust.

typography.fontFamily: "Source Han Sans SC", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif
typography.caption: 12px/1.5/400

components.hero: Wide and calm; summary copy should stay within two short paragraphs.
components.kpiCard: Four-card grid with compact trend indicators.
components.list: Lightweight filter row with clear status chips and sparse dividers.
components.detail: Top summary card followed by timeline and notes columns.
components.form: Two-column sections with explicit helper text.
components.timeline: Neutral axis with one strong current-state marker.
